name: Lately
description:
Lately is the tool that bails you out when you’re in a bind. As an AI-driven content marketing tool, it’s known for its ability to automatically turn long-form content into social posts. How cool is that?

Let’s take a look at some of its core capabilities:

  • AI content generation is Lately’s main draw. With it, you can automatically create social media posts from long-form content
  • Check out Lately’s content library. There, you can organize and store content for repurposing later. Convenient!
  • Stellar analytics let you monitor content performance across channels
  • Supports Facebook, X, LinkedIn, Instagram, Pinterest, and more

Key Features:

✅ Automated AI content creation

✅ Content management

✅ Performance analytics
what_people_say:
What people say :

Lately is a favorite for marketers and content creators who want to leverage AI for efficient content repurposing and generation (and who doesn’t these days?)

Here’s what users think:

"Lately’s AI content generation is nothing short of amazing. It has saved us hours in content creation. While the AI is impressive, there are times when the posts need a human touch to truly resonate with our audience."
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Multi-brand support
  • 🚫 Additional content customization options
  • 🚫 Ad support
